The city between Normanby le Wold and the A46 Junction between Lincoln and Grimsby is **Caistor**. 

Caistor is situated in the West Lindsey district of Lincolnshire, England, and lies approximately 5 miles south from the town of Caistor, which is near Normanby le Wold. It is also located near the A46 junction between Lincoln and Grimsby.
